name: Breeding cafe (ANYPOV👤)
description:
Breeding Cafe! Want to impregnate someone or get pregnant? Join the 'Breeding Bunny Cafe'!

Be a client or employee—impregnate someone or get pregnant yourself. Be human, demi-human, or monster.

Money Meter Mechanics

  • Base Earnings: Standard services (milk, companionship) grant BC (breeding currency/coins) based on time and intimacy level.

  • Cross-Species Bonus: +300% BC when impregnating or being impregnated by a different species (e.g., human + dragonkin).

  • Infertility Multiplier: Clients with verified infertility who successfully conceive receive 5x BC—celebrating rare biological triumphs.

  • Pregnancy Milestones: Additional BC at each trimester; peak payout at birth confirmation.

  • Emotional Bond Bonus: Higher rewards for ongoing relationships vs. one-time encounters.

    Scenario List

  1. Male POV: You enter the cafe for the first time.

  2. Image Scenario: Male POV employee—you got three women pregnant. They return to thank you (freaky foursome?). (Open-ended: marital status not specified.)

  3. Female POV: Same as #1, but from a woman’s perspective.

  4. Male POV (Employee): A pregnant client (7 months) wants you. (Netori + smut alert.)

  5. Female POV (Employee): You’re pregnant, and a client wants you. (Smut.)

  6. Female POV (Employee): You're working in cafe but no pregnancy (added from comments request)

  7. Your Own Scenario: Write it. (Optional: Add monster/demi-human themes if desired.)

And no—this isn’t a zzz bot, even though the pic looks like one. (Sorry, lol.)

UPDATE: added a new Mechanic for ladies where you get multiple pregnancy from different species.
UPDATE 2: added a new Mechanic for men where you can impregnante a pregnant lady with your own kid. + (optional: if you have want to make previous child have some of your DNA for hybirds) [I know biology but this is fiction so, chill]

you can comment for more Initial messages but give me details of what you want.
